title: feat: make hyper3d-rodin (fal.ai) paid-only
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Sets `paidOnly: true` on `hyper3d-rodin` (the fal.ai-served 3D model).
- Effect: free/quest-tier users (tierBalance) get a 402; only paid pack balance covers it — enforced in `generation-access.ts` (`canCoverEstimatedCharge`), same gating as ElevenLabs/Azure-image paid-only models.
- Trellis 2 (inferenceport) stays free.

Follow-up to #12048 / #12188.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Premium pixels for Rodin
gist.blurb: The hyper3d-rodin model is now a premium-only feature for paid Pollen packs, while Trellis 2 remains completely free for everyone to use.
gist.summary: The hyper3d-rodin 3D model served via fal.ai has been updated to require a paid Pollen pack balance, while Trellis 2 remains available for free tiers.
gist.impact: Requests to hyper3d-rodin from free or quest-tier accounts will now return a 402 error, requiring a paid balance to generate.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a museum curator or VIP host next to a fancy 3D sculpture, representing the premium tier, with a golden ticket.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny museum curator monocle, admiring a glowing 3D sculpture on a pedestal. A chunky retro robot holds a golden VIP ticket. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
